baseline_state_fields.baseline_kind: record whether the canonical baseline is the original operator or a minimally repaired prepared baseline.
baseline_state_fields.source_operator: record the workspace-relative path to the operator file that baseline preparation started from.
baseline_state_fields.baseline_operator: record the workspace-relative path to the operator snapshot saved under `baseline/`.
baseline_state_fields.test_file: record the workspace-relative path to the correctness harness used for the baseline.
baseline_state_fields.test_mode: record the resolved correctness mode used for the baseline run.
baseline_state_fields.bench_file: record the workspace-relative path to the benchmark harness used for the baseline.
baseline_state_fields.bench_mode: record the resolved benchmark mode used for the baseline run.
baseline_state_fields.perf_artifact: record the canonical baseline perf artifact path, normally `baseline/<operator>_perf.txt`.
baseline_state_fields.correctness_status: record the final baseline correctness result; use `passed` only after correctness succeeds.
baseline_state_fields.benchmark_status: record the final baseline benchmark result; use `passed` only after the benchmark succeeds.
baseline_state_fields.baseline_established: set this to `true` only after `correctness_status` is `passed`, `benchmark_status` is `passed`, and the canonical baseline artifacts are written.
